reviews.review_description: Once I got over the gimmick of swinging my arms to dig and realized the loot gets exponentially better as you go straight down I rapidly maximized all the upgrades and started dynamiting everything. found six chests in short order but what I had to do  to get the final chest genuinely surprised me. TLDR simplistic game, surprising end.

I have like 6 chests and I don’t know what to do with them I tried making a chest portal that didn’t work I tried putting them in a square that didn’t work I tried finding a key to unlock it that didn’t work i don’t know what I’m supposed to do with them

i love the game lists fun and its a cool idea can you pls make a leaf blowing game but one thing i found a glitch when i crouch down in real life it Phases me through the floor but love the game pls fix though

I'm an adult but I love digging holes in the sand at the beach with my kids - this invokes that same kind of sensation. The controls feel great, no glitchiness being in small confined spaces but no claustrophobia because you can just dig it wider. I'd seen videos but I didn't know if digging and climbing would feel right I had to try it myself and it does. I wish there was a tad more detail on the dirt but gameplay is solid and digging and finding things is addictive as hell

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this review! 🧡 
The comparison to digging on the beach is honestly the best compliment we could ask for -capturing that simple satisfaction was exactly our goal. We put a lot of effort into making the controls and climbing feel natural, so it's great to hear they clicked for you.

reviews.review_description: ever since i found out that this game was coming out i've always been checking the meta store every single day just to see if coming soon it turned into a price tag and sure enough it did and i was so happy because this game is so fun and addictive and i love the way you dig and how it feels it is a very addictive game. keep it up. (if I could buy stuff i would lol.

developer_response.body: Thank you for following the game for so long and for checking the store like that, Lenzo2121 - that kind of support means a lot to us. We’re really happy you’re enjoying your digging adventure and that it feels good to go deeper and deeper (even if a little addictive). Thanks again for the kind words and for playing!

reviews.review_description:
I just got 1 mission… I want to find the hidden treasure. 

I was so happy that my watch starts beeping. Digging in that direction. Going back up to sell my stuff in my backpack, so it won’t get lost due to less energy. Then finding back that hole  in the direction of the treasure. BUT  when I digged it up, didn’t know how to open it. Guess I need a key to open it…. But I already sold 2 keys 😭😭. 
So now I have to search for something to open that chest.

A great game with lots to discover.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for sharing.

To open chests you should use hammer next to shop. Just place chest on the wooden 'table' and grab hammer to hit it few times

reviews.review_description:
So I'm giving this a three but really it's a five and a zero. Let me explain! 

Sometimes you get home and you want to turn your brain off and just be a little mole and dig. This is that! It's very low stakes , there's very little repercussions for dying. It's fun! Just to dig around and the feel of digging is excellent. This is why I say it's a five star. I've been thinking about it everyday I get home and it's such a great way to relax.

Why I say a zero star.  I've spent many digging  down  to 70 meters and now the game has broken. I clear like half of all of 70 meters and now it can't load past the "continue" button. It crashes out with an error message about memory being more that 6.5gig, or something like that.   

To be clear, I love this game. It's soooo relaxing to dig and find stuff and upgrade your gear.  It's nearly meditative.  I'm just extremely disappointed that I can't continue excavating!

developer_response.body:
Hey, please reach us on support@wenklystudio.com or on our discord https://discord.gg/wenklystudio for support! We are happy to investigate what is the issue.

Best regards,
Paul

reviews.review_description: I LOVE THE GAME! Every think is awesome in this game, but the best is the dynamite. I just love seeing so many good crystal when i bomb a hole. Anyway everyone who reads this Review, get this game rn cause it does not diserved to be 5.99€ it diserves to be like 19.99€ or even higher.(sorry if my english is bad cause im not from usa,uk,canada,etc.)

developer_response.body: Thanks for support, we are so happy that you liked the game!

reviews.review_description: I love just being a little mole i just dig around I pick up cool things it's simple but amazing. this is an edit from a day after I submitted this review they should add a game mode where you do the same thing but you have to avoid a giant human trying to stop you from making all the holes in their yard

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your wholesome words about our game! Being “a little brave mole just digging around and finding cool stuff” is exactly the vibe we were going for, so it’s awesome to hear it landed that way for you. 

Oh, and thank you for your awesome suggestion too - a mode where you have to avoid a giant human trying to stop you from turning their yard into Swiss cheese sounds hilarious. We love ideas like this and we’re definitely keeping them in mind. Thanks again for the support and for taking the time to share your ideas!

reviews.review_title: It’s a lot of fun but lacking
reviews.review_description:
While fun it’s lacking replay value. I’d recommend really leaning into the terrain deformation, and possibly burry the whole map, so that we can dig in all directions. 

The biggest downside of a game like this is that its core mechanics while fun, struggle to stay interesting. And while it may differ from being just a mole, adding tools (shovels, picks, drills) could really help with to add variety.

I did really enjoy this game but I hope more gets added, as at the moment it feels like there’s nothing to come back for:(

reviews.review_title: Good but broke before i could finish it
reviews.review_description: I had a lot of fun with the game and played alot however before i could find all 7 statues the game started lagging to the point of crashing upon loading in playing on a quest 3

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for playing Mole a Hole and for letting us know about the issues you faced - we’re really glad you had fun with the game, and sorry about the lag and crash issues you ran into. That’s definitely not the experience we want you to have, especially when you’re so close to finding all the statues.

We’d be happy to help you with this. Please shoot us a problem description at support@wenklystudio.com with as much detail as you can (when it started happening, what you were doing, etc.), so we can investigate this further and see what’s going on. Thanks again for the feedback and for spending time with the game - it really helps us make it better.

reviews.review_description:
What a surprisingly addictive game. The gameplay is fairly simple and a lot of fun. One really gets the sense of being a mole and the challenges are nicely done. Another great game by Wenkly Studio (I'm also a big fan of Elven Assassin).

I already finished it and wished it was a bit longer or could be replayed with new challenges.

There are still a few smaller bugs in this game (sometime one hand disappears on the surface, or items disappear) but I assume they'll be fixed with the next update.

Overall a great game for those who dig it ☺️

Older gamer here and gotta be honest, I appreciate a game that makes me sweat. The only thing that kept me from going longer was my own endurance! Really well designed and fun to climb and dig. Now remind me not to sell any keys I find lol. Great work with this game.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your awesome review, Will-84. If the game made you sweat while having fun, we’ll take that as a big win, and we are happy to hear you’re enjoying your climbing and digging sessions! Thanks a ton for playing Mole a Hole and for your positive rating for our title.

reviews.review_description:
Good for the  Price, you need to listen to radio or something playing this it's so quiet just digging.
Finished in a couple of hours.
Saves were not great, surfaced, sold my stuff, next time I loaded in the game I had my money but no statues or upgrades 😐
Tried again and got through the whole game in a couple of hours.

Was nice to find different things digging.

No idea what you are doing with the ending and that demon creature and no way to defend yourself, makes no sense to the rest of the game.

Also, my watch going mad for a chest, only ice platform there?? Dug above and below but it seems to be be in the white stuff you can't dig 🤷‍♀️
I bought this game thinking it was fun. It was not and I couldn't get my money back. If this game gets this message I want my money back
I bought the game but it's not letting me play

developer_response.body:
So sorry we didn't make it on release. Only Quest 3 and 3s were supported till now.

We have added Quest 2 & Quest Pro support in newest update

reviews.review_description: Buy it no further questions

developer_response.body: Great to hear that, thanks for review and support!

reviews.review_description: Such a fun basic game! A relaxing time for sure! As soon as I saw it on some review channels I knew this was my kind of game for sure!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, troy.kenneson! Casual, relaxing and fun experience is what we were after, so we are glad to hear that our vibe resonate with you :)

reviews.review_description: It’s cool gets boring after a little and the energy thing is annoying

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the honest feedback, Sam757, we really appreciate it. We’re collecting feedback and suggestions to better understand what players expect and how the game is being experienced, so it’s great to hear your thoughts.

About the energy system, we get it that it can feel a bit demanding at first. The good news is that with a few cheap early upgrades, you’ll be able to dig for much longer and go much deeper without running out so quickly. Still, we hear you, and balancing things like this is something we’re keeping a close eye on. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Good game but I can't play

developer_response.body:
Hi, please reach us on support@wenklystudio.com we are happy to help.

If you use Quest 2, this could be an issue. The game is only for Quest3/Quest3s but if you use direct link you can still buy it. Contact Meta if this is an issue for refund.

EDIT:
So sorry we didn't make it on release. Only Quest 3 and 3s were supported till now.

We have added Quest 2 & Quest Pro support in newest update

reviews.review_title: I didnt get it Edit: thanks
reviews.review_description:
I brought this game and it’s not in my library
Edit : thanks for putting it on quest 2 Tysm

developer_response.body:
We are so happy we managed to optimize it better and it work on Quest 2 pretty well.

Have fun, and sorry we didn't make it on release.

reviews.review_description: I love being a little mole making underground tunnels and caverns with my own claws! Great buy, totally recommend!!!!!!!!!!

developer_response.body: We are glad you have fun in our game and thanks for review!

reviews.review_description: i love the game i just love in my backyard
Good game

This game is pretty fun but there is not that much to do so . You guy could add more modes like adventure were there premade holes and you have to worry about hunger and stuff. Along with new items and maybe monsters. And multiplayer would be fun. Also I really liked your frost survival game :) .

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the honest feedback and the kind words. We’re really happy you had fun with the game, and it’s awesome to hear you enjoyed our Frost Survival game too.

About your issue with the game, we totally get your point on more things that could be done here, and your ideas are really interesting, especially coming from a survival-games fan. An adventure-style mode with premade holes, survival elements like hunger, new items, monsters, and even multiplayer all sound like a ton of fun to think about. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with us, we really appreciate it.

reviews.review_description: Its a fun game but it sometimes gets boring so i have some ideas like mines or multiplayer lobby's maybe a monster but i haven went far to see if there is a monster but Maybe more things to buy and a map called scrap yard or construction site.
I love this game! Digging down selling its great! Its just after a while the progression becomes so slow and those bits that you cant dig through are so annoying! But besides that its not that bad!
it's so fun
I never write reviews but this game is to good I NEVER get bored of playing this game BUY IT
I love digging in VR BUY NOW.
i just startid and im so god!!!!!!!!!
